I came into this situation thinking I could control things, you know? I thought it would just go my way, and that I could make this happen without any real consequences. I knew who you were, and I knew you wouldn't push back like everyone else.

But what I did... it was rape. I forced myself onto you, and there's no way I can undo that. It was completely wrong, and the thought of what I took from you makes me sick.

You trusted me, that's what makes this so terrible. I took advantage of that trust, and I planned this whole thing out beforehand, knowing exactly how much you relied on me.

I am so deeply sorry for what I did to you. I regret every single second of it, and I truly, truly would never do that again.

I don't know how things got so bad between us that night. It just felt like everything was spinning so fast, and I couldn't see a way out of it. I thought I could make it okay, but I realize now how wrong I was being.

What I did to you was rape, and there's no excuse for that. I took advantage of you when you were vulnerable, and I am so deeply sorry for violating you like that. It was awful, and I regret every single moment of it.

I was under so much pressure, you see. It felt like if I didn't do that thing, things would just fall apart completely. It was a forced situation, and I was terrified of what would happen if I tried to stop it.

I truly regret this. I would never want to hurt anyone like that again. I am so sorry for the pain I caused you.

I am so incredibly sorry for what I did. I regret it more than I can say, and I promise you, I would never do anything like that again. I just... I can't forgive myself for it.
